# Vendored Web-gPhoto2 experiment runtime

- Package: `web-gphoto2` 0.4.1
- Source: https://github.com/GoogleChromeLabs/web-gphoto2
- npm integrity: `sha512-d3SeqD7rBpfCk1QezvER0qWi4le3LxFvAeKsVPfuX0muhUOv1HmnUs9tLxbFNNH74YcXe/1vl+hPKNP9ues70w==`
- License: LGPL-2.1-or-later (see `LICENSE`)
- Upstream status: archived read-only on 2026-02-09

These files are used only by the isolated Phase 1.6 experiment. They are not
loaded by the main MOTK Shoot application or included in its service-worker
cache. Replace the entire directory from a reviewed upstream build when
updating; do not edit the generated runtime files manually.
